title: Settlement Explainer Agent
shortDescription: Translates a settlement offer into the plain-English picture your client can actually evaluate, with the breakdown they need to decide.

seo.title: AI Settlement Explainer Agent for Law Firms | Dodonai
seo.description: Translate every settlement offer into the plain-English picture your client can evaluate. Net-to-client, lien deductions, fee structure, decision timeline.

hero.headline: AI Settlement Explainer Agent
hero.subheadline: Translates the gross number into the net-to-client picture: liens deducted, fees and costs itemized, structure laid out in plain English. The client conversation becomes a decision conversation, not an arithmetic conversation.
bullets: Net-to-client computation with every deduction itemized
Lien analysis pulled from the matter file
Comparison against past offers in the same matter
Plain-English client-facing letter drafted for attorney review

scenario.heading: The conversation you would have had to do in your head
paragraphs: A $185,000 settlement offer lands on a personal injury matter at 3pm. Your client wants to know what it actually means for her by tonight. In the old workflow, you'd spend 30 minutes pulling the lien total, computing the contingency fee against the gross, deducting costs, and writing the explanation. The Settlement Explainer drafts the breakdown in 2 minutes: gross, attorney fees per the agreement, costs to date, medical liens with the negotiated reductions, net-to-client. You verify the numbers, send the explanation letter, the client has the decision picture by 4pm instead of next morning.

whatItDoes.heading: What the Settlement Explainer does
bullets: Computes the net-to-client from the gross offer using the fee agreement and cost ledger
Pulls the lien picture from the matter file and applies any negotiated reductions
Compares the offer to prior offers in the same matter and to comparable past matters
Drafts a plain-English client letter explaining the breakdown
Flags any deduction that's still uncertain (a lien still in negotiation, a cost still being verified)

integrations: Practice management system for fee agreement and cost records
Document management system for lien correspondence
Email for the client-letter draft delivery

safety.heading: Safety posture
paragraphs: The breakdown is a draft for attorney review. The agent flags any input that's uncertain (a lien still in flux, a cost not yet posted) so the attorney can address it before the letter goes to the client. The client letter never sends without attorney signoff.

faq.question: What about structured settlements?
faq.answer: Structured settlements get the same breakdown plus a present-value calculation and a payment-schedule summary. For structures involving annuities, the agent surfaces the inputs needed to evaluate the structure rather than computing the annuity value itself, which the structured settlement broker provides.

faq.question: How does it handle complex lien portfolios?
faq.answer: Each lien in the matter file (Medicare, Medicaid, ERISA, hospital, subrogation) gets its own line in the breakdown. For matters with active lien negotiation, the agent shows both the original lien total and the current negotiated position so the picture reflects the most recent state.
